title: Bordered Revamped
description: Bordered is a minecraft mod where you have to survive in a limited border. It increases 1-100 blocks every minute, but it decreases when you die. You can disable decrease on death in the game rules.
body:
**Bordered** is a minecraft mod where you have to survive in a limited border. However, it increases every minute, but decreases if a player dies. Let's see if you can beat the game with limited space.

**You can get following advancements in this mod:**
- 100 Blocks
- 1,000 Blocks
- 10,000 Blocks
- 100,000 Blocks
- 1,000,000 Blocks
- Limited Space

**The mod also comes with the following commands:**
- /bordered start - places the border or continues if it was stopped
- /bordered showSize - shows the current size of the border
- /bordered stop - stops the border
- /border - shows the current size of the border
- /b - shows the current size of the border

I created the mod because i was bored, so enjoy!
